title: Exhuma
tmdbOverview: After tracing the origin of a disturbing supernatural affliction to a wealthy family's ancestral gravesite, a team of paranormal experts relocates the remains—and soon discovers what happens to those who dare to mess with the wrong grave.
synopsis: Exhuma (2024) is a mystery, horror and thriller film from South Korea. It carries a 6.9 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a M certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
